description: Roleplay prompt: Clean BibTeX Formatter for Academic Projects
template: I am preparing a BibTeX file for an academic project.Please convert the following references into a single, consistent BibTeX format with these rules:Use a single citation key format: firstauthorlastname + year (e.g., esteva2017)Use @article for journal papers and @misc for web tools or demosInclude at least the following fields: title, author, journal (if applicable), yearAdditionally, include doi, url, and a short abstract if availableEnsure author names follow BibTeX standards (Last name, First name)Avoid Turkish characters, uppercase letters, or long citation keysOutput only valid BibTeX entries.
